'''bakoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohzee|ohzee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohzee|ohzee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bakoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bækeseth|bækeseth]] || [[word:bækesej|bækesej]] || [[word:bækesesh|bækesesh]] || [[word:bækese|bækese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakokosoth|bakokosoth]] || [[word:bakokosoj|bakokosoj]] || [[word:bakokososh|bakokososh]] || [[word:bakokoso|bakokoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakosoth|bakosoth]] || [[word:bakosoj|bakosoj]] || [[word:bakososh|bakososh]] || [[word:bakoso|bakoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakofsoth|bakofsoth]] || [[word:bakofsoj|bakofsoj]] || [[word:bakofsosh|bakofsosh]] || [[word:bakofsof|bakofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakosotho|bakosotho]] || [[word:bakosojo|bakosojo]] || [[word:bakososho|bakososho]] || [[word:bakosoko|bakosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakosoth|bakosoth]] || [[word:bakosoj|bakosoj]] || [[word:bakososh|bakososh]] || [[word:bakoso|bakoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakosothol|bakosothol]] || [[word:bakosojol|bakosojol]] || [[word:bakososhol|bakososhol]] || [[word:bakosokol|bakosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakosothotho|bakosothotho]] || [[word:bakosojojo|bakosojojo]] || [[word:bakososhosho|bakososhosho]] || [[word:bakosoko|bakosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakosothon|bakosothon]] || [[word:bakosojon|bakosojon]] || [[word:bakososhon|bakososhon]] || [[word:bakosokon|bakosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakosothoro|bakosothoro]] || [[word:bakosojoro|bakosojoro]] || [[word:bakososhoro|bakososhoro]] || [[word:bakosokoro|bakosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
